data.title: Bit Origin plans to establish a Dogecoin treasury with $500 million, securing $400 million in equity and $100 million in convertible debt, with $15 million already closed for Dogecoin acquisition.
data.description: Bit Origin Ltd, a Singapore-based company listed on NASDAQ as BTOG, has revealed a groundbreaking initiative to establish a dedicated Dogecoin treasury supported by $500 million in equity and debt facilities. This move positions Bit Origin as the first entity to recognize Dogecoin as a key strategic asset. Through a press release, it was disclosed that the company has obtained $400 million in equity capital and an additional $100 million in convertible debt from accredited investors. A significant portion of the $15 million in convertible debt raised is specifically intended for the acquisition of Dogecoin. This development represents a significant step forward for Bit Origin Ltd as it ventures into the realm of cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: Immod Innovations hails CellBB as essential supplement in eWellnessmag.com feature. PRNewswire on July 17, 2025.
data.description: A prominent wellness and lifestyle magazine has named CellBB, a nutritional supplement, as "the most crucial supplement to incorporate into your daily routine." On July 17, 2025, in Denver, Immod Innovations, a top provider of specialty nutrition, proudly introduced their leading product, CellBB, which has been endorsed by eWellnessmag.com. CellBB is lauded for its exceptional benefits, making it a standout in the supplement industry.

data.title: 1911 Gold closes C$13.2 million bought deal life offering with 3,750,000 common shares sold at C$0.20 per share.
data.description: 1911 Gold Corporation has successfully completed a "bought deal" LIFE offering, generating gross proceeds of C$13,225,232.30. The offering included the sale of 3,750,000 common shares at C$0.20 per share, 2,924,000 common shares at C$0.342 per share, 31,163,633 common shares at C$0.288 per share, and 10,163,000 common shares at C$0.246 per share. The latter shares will qualify as "flow-through shares" under the Canadian Income Tax Act.

data.title: Compliance Group Inc. and Loftware partner for digital labeling in Life Sciences to drive transformation.
data.description: In Chicago, Compliance Group Inc., a top validation and regulatory consulting firm for the Life sciences sector, has partnered with Loftware, a global leader in product identification and supply chain transparency. The partnership aims to enhance compliance and scalability. By merging Loftware's cloud-based labeling technology with CG's labeling proficiency and validated Computer Software Assurance (CSA) alignment, the collaboration seeks to achieve a robust and future-proof solution.

data.title: Dow jumps 100 points on upbeat earnings; PepsiCo posts 1% YoY sales increase in Q2 with $22.7 billion in sales.
data.description: U.S. stocks opened higher Thursday, with the Dow Jones index up over 100 points to 44,398.39, an increase of 0.32%. The NASDAQ rose 0.42% to 20,817.71 and the S&P 500 gained 0.27% to 6,280.57. Industrials shares saw a jump of 0.8%, while health care stocks dipped by 1.3%. PepsiCo, Inc. reported better-than-expected second-quarter results, with adjusted earnings per share of $2.12 and quarterly sales of $22.726 billion. The company raised its full-year 2025 adjusted EPS guidance to $8.04. Volcon, Inc. shares surged 286% to $35.59. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global magnetic current sensor market to reach $3.51B by 2030, with CAGR of 12.1% from $1.98B in 2025 - MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the worldwide magnetic current sensor market is expected to witness significant growth. The market, valued at USD 1.98 billion in 2025, is forecasted to reach USD 3.51 billion by 2030, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.1%. This growth is attributed to the widespread adoption of hall-effect current sensors.

data.title: Lennar launches 4 new home collections at Valencia by FivePoint in Santa Clarita; a vibrant community.
data.description: Lennar, a prominent homebuilder in the US, recently launched four new collections of single-family and paired homes at Valencia by FivePoint in the Santa Clarita Valley. The community is renowned for its vibrant and master-planned features. This unveiling on July 17, 2025, highlights Lennar's commitment to providing quality housing options. Valencia offers a range of housing choices to cater to different preferences and needs, contributing to the growth and development of the area.

data.title: Premise Health partners with NCL to offer physical therapy and chiropractic care to unions and large employers.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Brentwood, Tennessee, Premise Health, the leading direct healthcare provider for unions and major employers, announced a collaboration with the National Coalition of Labor (NCL), Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council (MACRC), and Midwest Operating Engineers Fringe Benefit. This partnership is significant as Premise Health is the largest company in this sector and serves a considerable number of unions and large employers across the nation.

data.title: Jamin Harkness returns to TMG as Partner and COO, leading property management firm in the Southeast.
data.description: Atlanta, as of July 17, 2025 - A renowned property management firm in the Southeast, The Management Group, LLC (TMG), is excited to welcome back Jamin Harkness as Partner and Chief Operating Officer. Harkness, a prominent figure in the multifamily industry, has rejoined TMG, bringing valuable expertise to the team. Having previously worked with TMG, he is expected to make a significant impact in his new role.

data.title: Power Slap and Gorilla Lifestyle announce industry-first marketing partnership. Gorilla Elixir named official alternative beverage partner.
data.description: Power Slap, the global leader in slap fighting, has recently revealed a significant partnership with Gorilla Lifestyle. The deal, slated to span multiple years, designates Gorilla Elixir as the official alternative beverage partner of Power Slap. This collaboration signifies a new chapter in the realm of slap fighting, showcasing the increasing prominence of hemp-derived THC products. The announcement was made in New Orleans on July 17, 2025, solidifying a groundbreaking venture in the industry. This alignment of Power Slap and Gorilla Lifestyle epitomizes a fusion of sports and wellness, catering to a diverse audience.
